test.name: TC_001 — Login With Valid Credentials
test.doc: Access the login URL, enter valid credentials and verify redirection to secure area

test.name: TC_002 — Login With Incorrect Password
test.doc: Access the login URL, enter valid username with wrong password and verify error message

test.name: TC_003 — Login With Incorrect Username
test.doc: Access the login URL, enter wrong username with valid password and verify error message

test.name: TC_004 — Logout After Successful Login
test.doc: Login successfully then click Logout and verify redirection to login page with logout message
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: No keyword with name 'Open Browser No Popup' found. Did you try using keyword 'SeleniumLibrary.Open Browser' and forgot to use enough whitespace between keyword and arguments?

suite.doc: Test suite for login and logout scenarios on the-internet.herokuapp.com
